title: EMC Flatworld modpack
description: Just a private flatwork modpack with EMC and some other mods.
body:
EMC Flatworld Modpack

Welcome to the EMC Flatworld Modpack! This specially curated modpack is designed for an exciting private Let's Play experience in a flat world setting. Dive into a unique Minecraft journey where simplicity meets innovation, and every block and item holds the potential for exponential growth and endless possibilities.

**I do not promise any support for this modpack.**

Currently, we implemented:
- EMC mods
- Optimization mods
- QoL mods

Plans:
- Automatization mods
- More mobs/blocks
- Try to make everything still challenging.
